global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic outdoor scene of a small mock-memorial set up at the base of an aging residential outdoor AC condenser unit on a Phoenix property. The memorial is dark-humor: a small chalk outline of a body shape on the concrete equipment pad next to the unit, a wilted bouquet of grocery-store flowers leaning against the unit's grille, a single white candle on the concrete. The AC unit itself looks weathered, dust-caked, faded — clearly the 'deceased.' The setting is a residential side yard, tan stucco wall, intense Phoenix afternoon sunlight, long harsh shadows. Mood: gallows humor, the inevitable summer death of the system being mourned in advance. No people in the scene. No text overlay. Photorealistic, shot on 35mm lens, dramatic lighting.

composition.framing: medium, AC unit center, memorial elements on the ground at its base
composition.focal_point: the wilted flowers leaning against the AC unit, with the chalk outline visible on the pad
